THE MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER AND DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE ARE OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON THE MOTION FOR STAY. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Of Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Craig M. Collins, Esq. of Blum Collins, Tel. 213.572.0405, for plaintiff and moving party;
Justin Fields, Esq. of Krieg keller Sloan Reilley & Roman, Tel. 415.318.3581, for defendants Seyfarth etal;
Patricia L. Bonheyo, Esq. of Goodman Neuman Hamilton, Tel. 415.705.0419, for defendants Rowbotham.

The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF QUENTIN WAHL'S Motion For Stay Of Proceedings is granted. This case is stayed in its entirety pending completion of the IRS investigation into the transaction at issue in this case. The Motion for Protective Order and Demurrer and Motion to Strike are off calendar as moot in light of the ruling on the Motion for Stay. The court further ordered a status conference on May 17, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
